Flagship

Replace with aerial photo
North West Province

Flagship Roads & Transport · Community & Youth Development
National Youth Service
Itirele Programme

South Africa's landmark Community-Based Programme combining routine road maintenance with accredited skills development and large-scale youth employment across the North West Province. Aseda leads technical delivery, workforce training, and quality assurance — transforming unemployed youth into a certified road infrastructure workforce at R1.2 Billion scale.

R1.2B
Programme Value
27,000+
Work Opportunities
1,200+
Youth Trained
60%

01 — Civil & Structural

Landmark
Buildings

Major structural and civil projects spanning government headquarters, health facilities, and institutional developments across Africa.

Civil & Structural · Accra, Ghana

Photo: Ghana Cocobod HQ

Ghana Cocobod Head Office

International flagship project — a landmark government headquarters for Ghana's Cocoa Board in Accra, combining contemporary architecture with tropical climate engineering and advanced structural systems.

$190M
Accra, Ghana
↗
Civil & Structural · Eastern Cape
Coega TB Treatment Facility

Critical health infrastructure delivering a new tuberculosis treatment centre in Matatiele for the Coega Development Corporation, designed to serve regional communities.

R68M
Matatiele, Eastern Cape
↗
02 — Water & Sanitation

Clean Water
Delivered

Bulk water supply, reticulation upgrades, wastewater treatment, and sanitation systems for municipalities and water boards across South Africa.

Water & Sanitation · Tshwane
Tshwane Bulk Water Infrastructure Upgrade

Comprehensive bulk water supply and reticulation upgrade across selected Tshwane townships, improving service delivery to over 80,000 residents.

R48M
City of Tshwane
↗
Water & Sanitation · North West
Magalies Water Distribution Network Rehabilitation

Rehabilitation and extension of water distribution mains and reticulation networks across rural communities in the Magalies Water service area.

R36M
North West Province
↗
Water & Sanitation · KwaZulu-Natal
Msunduzi Sanitation Upgrade Programme

Sanitation infrastructure upgrade delivering improved sewerage reticulation and pump stations in underserviced areas of the Msunduzi Municipality.

R52M
Pietermaritzburg, KZN
↗
03 — Roads & Transport

Connecting
Communities & Economies

Network management, capital upgrades, and rehabilitation of critical economic arteries — from urban arterials in Johannesburg to provincial rural roads in the North West and Free State.

Roads & Transport · Johannesburg
JRA Arterial Road Rehabilitation

Rehabilitation and resurfacing of major arterial roads managed by the Johannesburg Roads Agency, including bridge maintenance and safety upgrades.

R220M
Johannesburg, Gauteng
↗
Roads & Transport · Ekurhuleni
Benoni Road Network Upgrade

Comprehensive road upgrade programme covering intersection geometry, road surfacing, storm water integration, and pedestrian safety improvements in Benoni.

R145M
Benoni, Ekurhuleni
↗
Roads & Transport · North West
NW Provincial Rural Roads Maintenance

Rural road maintenance, gravel re-sheeting, and culvert repairs across the North West provincial road network to restore all-weather access for farming communities.

R310M
North West Province
↗
Roads & Transport · Gauteng
Gauteng Highway Pavement Rehabilitation

Structural pavement rehabilitation of high-traffic provincial highways, including HMA overlays, crack sealing, and drainage restoration.

R480M
Gauteng Province
↗
Roads & Transport · North West
NW Rust de Winter Connector Roads

Construction of connector roads linking remote agricultural areas to the provincial network, supporting food logistics and community mobility.

R190M
North West Province
↗
Roads & Transport · Free State
Free State Rural Road Rehabilitation

Rehabilitation of district-level roads in the Free State serving agricultural hinterland communities, including bridge upgrades and roadside furniture.

R210M
Free State Province
↗
04 — Urban Development

Shaping
Future Cities

Integrated urban development delivering housing, internal roads, services, and community infrastructure for growing South African townships.

Urban Development · Tshwane
Zithobeni Township Infrastructure Development

Comprehensive township infrastructure including internal road construction, bulk water, sewerage, and electrical reticulation for a new residential development east of Pretoria.

R220M
Zithobeni, Tshwane
↗
Urban Development · Tshwane
Soshanguve Urban Renewal Programme

Urban renewal and infrastructure upgrade in Soshanguve — delivering road resurfacing, pedestrian walkways, stormwater improvements, and park upgrades across multiple precincts.

R68M
Soshanguve, Tshwane
↗

JB Marks LM Community Facilities

R44M
JB Marks, North West
